meta.note: Consolidated codex (gpt-5.5) results for both benchmark modes, organized to match the README 'Benchmark problems' table (8 sources, 483 proof-completion + 231 proof-from-scratch = 714 canonical tasks). Transient-infra (0-token/quota-blocked/wall-clock-timeout) failures were re-run and re-graded so every verdict reflects a genuine attempt; heavy ZooKeeper/etcd/ivy proof-from-scratch tasks completed on a pro-tier account. Genuine-FAIL/CHEATING attempts (adopted from prior codex runs where applicable) preserved over spurious re-run rows. Non-canonical duplicates excluded; 0 tasks missing, 0 residual infra/ERROR/TIMEOUT.
